unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 桥 (bridge) 像桥一样连接两边

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some bridges are made from rope!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 绳子 (rope) 像绳子一样挂在桥上

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some bridges are made from wood.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 制作 (made) 想象工匠在制作桥梁

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some bridges are made from stone.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 石头 (stone) 像石头一样坚硬的桥

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some bridges are made from metal.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 金属 (metal) 像金属的桥梁闪闪发光

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some bridges are made from wood.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 木头 (wood) 想象木头桥的温暖感
